programme.desc: When single mother Julia realizes night nanny Olivia is turning her children against her, Julia must fight to prove that Olivia is not who she says she is before she gets custody of the kids for good.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: The true saga of Anna Nicole Smith whose youthful optimistic dreams of fame and fortune turn darkly tragic.

programme.desc: Adventuring outside, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated, but when his family risks everything to come looking for him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite reformed super-villain Gru returns for more adventures with Lucy, their daughters, and the lovably zany minions.

programme.title: Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The world's greatest rescue squad are trapped in space while an evil enemy works overtime.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Eight years after a strange incident at a dinosaur theme park, a paleontologist is approached by a wealthy couple who offer him a big sum to fly over a notorious island, but things soon turn dangerous.

programme.title: Despicable Me

programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: A cynical grump goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail that has forever dreamed of the ability to move fast is granted his wish after a freak accident. Now he's out to win the Indy 500.

programme.desc: Join the fun when the Little family adopts an adorably spunky boy named Stuart, who looks a lot like a mouse. But, Snowbell, the family cat wants Stuart out of the house ... permanently!

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: When Mr Peabody and Sherman break the rules of time travel by meeting many of history's greatest characters, they must repair the damage they have done before it changes their world forever.

programme.desc: A high school student who can see people’s emotions as colours forms a band with two classmates, and through music they build friendships and grow closer while practising together in a quiet, remote setting.

programme.desc: Boog plans a hunting trip for his woodland buddies but they can't attend, making Boog take a trip on his own.

programme.desc: A vet targets a disaster-prone St Bernard for animal experimentation, and it's up to his family to save the cuddly canine.

programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.desc: A dapper Koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.desc: Zohan is the Israeli army's most lethal weapon. But he's tired of fighting terrorists and wants to be a hairdresser in New York, even if he has to fake his own death.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Discovering covert and faulty intelligence causes a U.S. Army officer to go rogue as he hunts for Weapons of Mass Destruction in an unstable region.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex con is out to avenge the murder of his brother during a botched robbery, but the circumstances of the actual killing become muddled and the killer obscure.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: Hunting a terrorist who has destroyed most of the fleet, the crew of the Enterprise must take a leap into unknown territory where loyalties will be tested and ultimate sacrifices made.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When two detectives are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the alluring and lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder leads CSI to a group of white supremacists, the discovery of precious items stolen from Holocaust survivors, and perhaps the uncovering of a former Nazi guard.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labour, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The death of a Ukrainian man helps CSI uncover a sex trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the deputy mayor is killed, suspicion quickly falls on a sleazy newspaper publisher. Meanwhile, the "blue flu" could cause problems between Danny and the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab tackles a case involving a murdered Internet entrepreneur whose body has been picked apart by vultures.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bodies are discovered at the North and South ends of the city, Mac and the team deftly begin to navigate the trail of evidence left behind by the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three state area.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an unidentified shooting victim turns out to be a rising star in the underground world of hip-hop dance battles, the CSIs turn their attention to a long list of rival dancers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a software company executive bleeds to death on a Manhattan street, the CSI's must delve into the wet and messy world of food parties , where groups of people experience food in an sensual way.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A big rig accident results in the discovery of an interstate trucking ring that specialises in human cargo and black market organ harvesting, and sets off a race against time to save a hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body.

programme.desc: Two days before a Grand Prix Race, when a racing legend dies in a car explosion on the streets of Manhattan, the CSIs discover that car tampering is the cause; however, the investigation leads viewers through the professional racing community and beyond.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team must unravel the series of events from a wild night for a group of friends, a night which ended in four dead bodies, and a fifth person wandering the streets covered in blood and wielding an axe.

programme.desc: When a double homicide involving two young journalists who are investigating a story about gold fraud occurs on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs must find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.desc: When a woman linked to an unsolved murder case is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest a suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: In 1967, three generations of spirited friends from Dublin chase miracles on a pilgrimage to Lourdes — and navigate unexpected revelations along the way.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral in which the dead is anything but the protagonist. The deceased is Daniel's father. He lives with his mother and girlfriend at the family house, and is in charge of organizing the event and paying for the expenses. To say goodbye to this kind man, apart from a coffin with the wrong body, a series of outrageous characters arrives: a brother-in-law on an acid trip, Daniel's hypochondriac friend who has perfect timing for making the most importunate comments, a prodigious but stingy son who lives in a New York, and a dwarf who claims part of the fortune.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Creation
programme.desc: What happens when a world-renowned scientist, crushed by the loss of his eldest daughter, formulates a theory in conflict with religious dogma? This is the story of Charles Darwin and his master-work "The Origin of Species". It tells of a global revolution played out within the confines of a small English village; a passionate marriage torn apart by the most dangerous idea in history; and a theory saved from extinction by the logic of a child.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: A man of many talents arrives in a strange and haunted town on a mission to locate a stolen artefact for his menacing client, Fletcher finds himself entangled in a twilight world of vampires, sleeping beauties, Voodoo gangsters, noir private eyes, and masked avengers. Welcome to The Show.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: A young beauty impulsively marries small-town doctor in order to leave her father's pig farm far behind. But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: For his directorial debut, Andy Serkis brings to life the inspiring true love story between Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease. When Robin is struck down by polio at the age of 28, he is confined to a hospital bed and given only a few months to live. With the help of Diana's twin brothers and the ground-breaking ideas of inventor Teddy Hall, Robin and Diana dare to escape the hospital ward to seek out a full and passionate life together - raising their young son, traveling and devoting their lives to helping other polio patients.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Instead of wanting to be like her older sister, who is preparing to be a traditional Indian wife, young Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero David Beckham! Eventually, her family must decide whether or not to let Jess chase her dream – and a soccer ball – in this insightful romantic comedy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Madame Bovary

But after being introduced to the glamorous world of high society, she soon becomes bored with her stodgy husband and mundane life, and seeks prestige and excitement outside the bonds of marriage.

programme.title: Tell It To The Bees
programme.desc: Dr. Jean Markham returns to the town she left as a teenager to take over her late father's medical practice. When a school-yard scuffle lands Charlie in her surgery, she invites him to visit the hives in her garden and tell his secrets to the bees, as she once did. The new friendship between the boy and the bee keeper brings his mother Lydia into Jean's world.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A solitary middle-aged bachelor and a naive Irish teenager transform one another's lives to arrive at a place of recognition, redemption and wisdom in Atom Egoyan's adaptation of William Trevor's celebrated 1994 novel. Seventeen and pregnant, Felicia travels to England in search of her lover and is found instead by Joseph Ambrose Hilditch, a helpful catering manager whose kindness masks a serial killer. Hilditch has murdered several young women, but he has no conscious awareness of the crimes like Felicia, he doesn't see his true self. Felicia's Journey is a story of innocence lost and regained: Felicia awakens to the world's dangers and duplicities and Hilditch, who grew up lonely and unloved, comes to realise what was taken from him, and what he himself has taken.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Urban Hymn
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the 2011 British summer riots, Michael Caton-Jones' URBAN HYMN is a redemptive coming-of-age story following wayward teen, Jamie (Letitia Wright). Encouraged by inspiring and unconventional care worker Kate (Shirley Henderson) to use singing as a release from her troubled life, Jamie's loyalties soon become torn between Kate and her possessive and volatile best friend, Leanne (Isabella Laughland).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Dom Hemingway
programme.desc: Dom Hemingway is a larger-than-life safecracker with a loose fuse, funny, profane, and dangerous. Back on the streets of London after twelve years in prison, it's time to collect what he's owed for keeping his mouth shut. Travelling with his devoted best friend Dickie, Dom visits his crime boss Mr Fontaine in the south of France to claim his reward. But Dom's drink and drug-fuelled ego decides that what he's lost can't be replaced. One car accident and a femme fatale later, Dom realises that his priority must be to reconnect with his long-lost daughter Evelyn. But Dom does what Dom does best. He screws things up for everyone.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A solitary middle-aged bachelor and a naive Irish teenager transform one another's lives to arrive at a place of recognition, redemption and wisdom in Atom Egoyan's adaptation of William Trevor's celebrated 1994 novel. programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Banksy Job
programme.desc: AK47, a self-proclaimed 'art terrorist', details the story of a time when he set out to swipe a well-known piece of street artist Banksy's public art in central London.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: 1940, London, the Blitz; with the country’s morale at stake, Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew, work under fire to make a film to lift the nation’s spirits - and inspire America to join the war. A witty, romantic and moving portrayal of a young woman finding her way, and her voice, in the mayhem of war… and the movies!
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: The Queen of Ireland is the incredible story of Pandora 'Panti' Bliss and her creator, Rory O'Neill. Part glamorous aunt, part Jessica Rabbit, Panti is an accidental activist and, in her own words, “a court jester, whose role is to say the unsayable.” Directed by Conor Horgan, the film follows Rory and Panti on their journey from a small town in Mayo to national figureheads for equality, and all the way to global spokespersons for LGBT rights.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: BAFTA-winning drama starring Jessie Buckley. A fragile young woman begins a potentially dangerous relationship with an outsider. Disturbing violence/some strong language.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Whisky Galore!
programme.desc: Based on the infamous 1941 true story, Whisky Galore! is a charming and heart-warming tale of a close-knit Scottish island community who mischievously relieve a sinking cargo ship of cases of whisky during wartime scarcity. The ensuing merriment is threatened when Excise Men try to spoil the party by catching the crafty locals, red handed, with the bottled loot. After enduring a ‘dry’ period, the shipwreck and its amber cargo was like mana from heaven to the islanders, to whom whisky was part of the very life blood of their Island!”
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Set in 1960s Britain, Toast is based on the bittersweet story of food writer Nigel Slater's childhood and his difficult journey into adulthood. (Helena Bonham Carter, Freddie Highmore)
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Elstree 1976
programme.desc: In 1976, during the hottest summer on record, Star Wars was shot in suburban North London. Nobody involved had any idea how big the film would become, many couldn't even remember the title. Yet, for the extras and actors in smaller roles, their faces hidden in masks and helmets, this seemingly insignificant job would go on to colour their lives even four decades later.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Tensions mount for the beleaguered British Prime Minister Winston Churchill (Brian Cox) in the days leading up to infamous Allied D-Day landings in Normandy, France in June, 1944. Fearful of repeating his deadly mistakes from World War I in the Battle of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with his historical destiny, Churchill is reluctant to embark on the large-scale campaign, one that the entire war effort hinges upon. Clashing with his Allied political opponents U.S. General Dwight D. Eisenhower (John Slattery) and British Field Marshal Bernard Law Montgomery (Julian Wadham), the troubled Churchill receives support and devotion from his wife, the brilliant and unflappable Clementine Churchill (Miranda Richardson). With her strength and shrewdness, “Clemmie” halts Winston’s physical, mental spiritual collapse and inspires him on to greatness.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: Following the armed seizure of the Iranian Embassy in London in April 1980, six tense days unfold as negotiations fail and fear grips the city. Inside, hostages endure uncertainty while outside, elite SAS commandos meticulously plan a daring rescue mission. The operation, executed with precision and bravery, becomes a defining moment in British military history, showcasing courage, discipline, and the power of swift, decisive action under extreme pressure.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: A British army corporal is recruited into an elite commando unit under the command of a battle-hardened major during the Second World War. The soldiers are sent on a dangerous mission into occupied Norway to capture a vital German radar installation. Action adventure, with Sean Bean, Danny Dyer, Izabella Miko and James D'Arcy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Six Minutes To Midnight
programme.desc: Set in the summer of 1939, "Six Minutes to Midnight" follows Thomas Miller, an English teacher at the Augusta Victoria College, a finishing school for the daughters of high-ranking Nazi officials. As World War II looms, Miller discovers a conspiracy and must navigate dangerous waters to expose the truth and protect the students.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: 'Fish Tank' is the story of Mia, a volatile 15-year-old who is always in trouble and who has become excluded from school and ostracized by her friends. On a hot summer’s day, her mother brings home a mysterious stranger named Connor who promises to change everything – and bring love into their lives.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: An expert rafter takes her family for a day out on the river. But when two bank robbers hijack their raft it turns into a white-water knuckle-biter.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Houston, we have a problem - a fuel leak that threatens to doom three astronauts in space during NASA's 1970 moon mission.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A man meets a clone of himself and stumbles into a grand conspiracy about clones taking over the world.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way out, psychedelic spaceships and free love. Space agent Barbarella is assigned stopping the evil Durand-Durand and saving humanity.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students meet in Saturday detention and discover how they have a great deal more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet will collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is under way.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths befalls their small town, an offbeat group of friends led by Sidney Prescott become the target of a masked killer.

programme.title: Barbarella
programme.desc: In the far future, in a time of way out, psychedelic spaceships and free love. Space agent Barbarella is assigned stopping the evil Durand-Durand and saving humanity.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students meet in Saturday detention and discover how they have a great deal more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet will collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is under way.

programme.title: Scream

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: A casino manager in 1970s Las Vegas faces threats from a troubled old friend, an FBI investigation, corrupt politicians, and his wife’s painful past. This crime drama explores power, betrayal, and the unraveling of a man’s empire.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: A close friend of the President & his family are murdered aboard their yacht in the Caribbean, setting off a chain of events that leads Jack Ryan into a dangerous confrontation with a drug cartel.

programme.title: Out Of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Jack Ryan, a retired CIA agent, is on vacation in England when he stops an assassination attempt on an important member of the Royal Family.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: Peaceful farmer Benjamin Martin is driven to lead the Colonial Militia during the American Revolution when a sadistic British officer murders his son.

programme.title: Barb Wire

programme.title: Apollo 13

programme.title: Planes, Trains And Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.
